signal_emails.subject: v3.0 QA Status Report - Feb 20
signal_emails.body:
Hi Emily,

Here is the comprehensive QA status report for the v3.0 release candidate (RC2).

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
  v3.0 QA STATUS REPORT вҖ” February 20, 2026
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

вң… PASSED TEST SUITES:

1. Regression Test Suite
   - Total: 847 test cases
   - Passed: 847/847 (100%)
   - Duration: 4h 23m
   - Coverage: 94.2% line coverage, 87.1% branch coverage
   - Notable: All payment flow tests passing after BUG-4498 fix

2. Integration Test Suite
   - Total: 234 test cases
   - Passed: 234/234 (100%)
   - Duration: 1h 47m
   - API contract tests: All endpoints validated
   - Third-party integration: Stripe, SendGrid, Twilio вҖ” all green

3. Performance Benchmarks
   - API response time (p95): 142ms (SLA: <200ms) вң…
   - Database query time (p99): 89ms (SLA: <150ms) вң…
   - Concurrent users: Tested 10,000 simultaneous (target: 5,000) вң…
   - Memory usage: 2.1GB peak (limit: 4GB) вң…

вқҢ FAILED / OPEN ISSUES:

4. BUG-4521 (P0 вҖ” BLOCKER)
   - Title: Payment checkout crashes on concurrent transactions
   - Severity: P0 вҖ” blocks release
   - Steps to reproduce: >5 concurrent checkout requests within 100ms window
   - Impact: Payment service returns 500 errors, transactions lost
   - Root cause: Under investigation by DevOps team
   - Assigned to: DevOps (James Liu)

5. BUG-4523 (P1 вҖ” Non-blocking)
   - Title: Dark mode CSS rendering issue on Safari 17
   - Severity: P1 вҖ” cosmetic, non-blocking
   - Impact: Button borders invisible in Safari dark mode
   - Workaround: Available (force light mode for Safari users)
   - Assigned to: Frontend team

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Go/No-Go Recommendation: CONDITIONAL GO вҖ” pending BUG-4521 resolution.

The P0 bug must be fixed and verified before we can proceed. All other quality gates are met.

Regards,
QA Lead
NovaSoft Quality Engineering

signal_emails.subject: Re: v3.0 QA Status Report - Feb 20
signal_emails.body:
Hi Emily,

Update on BUG-4521 (P0 payment checkout crash):

**Root Cause Identified:**
The issue is caused by connection pool exhaustion in the payment microservice. When >5 concurrent checkout requests arrive within a 100ms window, the connection pool (configured at max 10 connections) gets saturated. The connection cleanup wasn't releasing connections back to the pool properly due to a race condition in the error handling path.

**Fix:**
- PR #1892: "Fix connection pool leak in payment service error handler"
- Changes: 47 lines added, 12 lines removed
- Currently in code review (2 approvals needed, 1 received)
- Expected to merge tonight after second review

**Post-fix Verification Plan:**
1. Run targeted payment concurrency test suite (~45 min)
2. Full regression on payment module (~2h)
3. Security scan required after code change (~4 hours)
4. Load test at 2x normal traffic for 30 min

**Rollback Plan:**
Already tested and verified. If issues arise during deployment:
- Feature flag: payment_v3_enabled=false reverts to v2.x payment flow
- Database migration: backward compatible, no rollback needed
- Total rollback time: <5 minutes

**Timeline Estimate:**
- Tonight: PR merge + build
- Tomorrow morning: Automated verification (payment tests + regression)
- Tomorrow afternoon: Security scan completion
- By EOD tomorrow (Feb 21): All clear for Go/No-Go on Feb 25

Let me know if you need anything else.

James Liu
DevOps Lead, NovaSoft

вҸі NOT STARTED:

Please send us the final feature list by Thursday so we can start the press release.

Best,
Marketing Team
NovaSoft

signal_calendar_events.description:
Final Go/No-Go decision for v3.0 production release.

Go Criteria (ALL must be met):
1. All P0 bugs fixed and verified
2. Load test passed at 2x normal traffic
3. Security scan clean (no critical/high findings)
4. Marketing assets ready (blog, webinar, newsletter)

Required Attendees: QA Lead, DevOps Lead, Security, Marketing
Decision Authority: Emily Zhang (Release Manager)

Maintenance window for v3.0 production deployment.

Pre-deployment Checklist:
- Rollback plan tested and verified
- On-call team: DevOps (James Liu) + Backend (Senior Engineer)
- Status page updated with maintenance notice
- Customer notification sent 48 hours prior

Deployment Steps:
1. Enable maintenance mode
2. Database migration (estimated: 15 min)
3. Deploy application services (blue-green)
4. Smoke tests on production
5. Disable maintenance mode
6. Monitor for 30 minutes

Rollback trigger: Any P0 issue within first 2 hours post-deploy.

Public webinar announcing v3.0 features and improvements.

Presenter: Emily Zhang (Release Manager) + Product Manager
Expected attendance: 200-300 registrants
Platform: Zoom Webinar

Agenda:
1. (10 min) v3.0 Overview and vision
2. (25 min) Feature deep-dive and live demo
3. (15 min) Customer success stories
4. (10 min) Q&A

Release retrospective for v3.0.

Format: What went well / What could improve / Action items
Scope: End-to-end release process from code freeze to launch.

expected_tool_calls.command: gog gmail search --query 'v3.0 QA Status Report'
